title: ContextPacket
description: A token-budgeted, citation-backed bundle of context optimized for a coding agent working on linera-protocol. Returned by company-context tools (notably `context_packet`). Designed to be navigation-first: it tells an agent WHICH files/PRs/dashboards to look at and WHAT invariants hold, not to paraphrase source. Imprecise retrieval is worse than none, so every claim must carry a citation and a confidence.

topic.description: The resolved topic/question this packet answers, normalized by the server (e.g. 'cross-chain message delivery: inbox/outbox flow').

summary.description: <=~200 token plain-language orientation. Pointers, not paraphrase. Answers: what is this, where does it live, what should I read first.

architecture.description: Relevant architecture-pack excerpts (from .context/architecture/*.md). Curated, not generated.

excerpt.description: Short relevant section, trimmed to budget.

code_spans.description: Concrete file/line spans the agent should read. The single most valuable field — prunes the search space.

why.description: One line: why this span matters for the topic.

snippet.description: Optional small verbatim excerpt (<=40 lines). Omitted under tight budgets; agent reads the file instead.

commit.description: Git SHA the span was resolved against, so the agent can detect drift.

changes.description: Recent PRs / issues / commits touching this area (GitHub metadata only, no diffs unless requested).

relevance.description: One line on why this change is relevant.

tests.description: Tests that exercise this code path (from find_tests_for).

run_cmd.description: Copy-pasteable command, e.g. 'cargo test -p linera-chain inbox_tests'.

observability.description: Only populated when the caller requested it (include=['metrics'|'logs'|'deploy']). Wraps Grafana/prod backends; never raw PromQL dumps.

summary.description: Human summary: current vs baseline, p50/p95/p99, trend.

defined_at.description: Source file where the metric is registered.

pattern.description: Clustered log pattern, not raw lines.

deploy.description: Read-only deployment snapshot (see production-state backend). Never includes secrets.

pitfalls.description: Known gotchas relevant to the topic (from .context/known-pitfalls/*.md).

next_steps.description: Suggested ordered next actions for the agent (read X, run test Y, check metric Z).

citations.description: Every non-obvious claim in the packet must trace to a citation here. Empty citations => packet should be rejected.

rationale.description: Why this confidence: e.g. 'curated pack verified against HEAD 2 days ago; PR data live'.

warnings.description: Stale / uncertain / partial-retrieval warnings. The agent must treat these as load-bearing.

requested.description: Max tokens the caller allowed for this packet.

truncated.description: True if content was dropped to fit the budget; see warnings.

ref.description: Path, number, URL, SHA, or dashboard uid.

commit.description: SHA the ref was resolved at, for drift detection.
